events.title: World Peace Awakening 2026
events.address: 8369, Cub Creek Rd, Nashville TN 37209, USA
events.description: A global gathering dedicated to peace, unity, and cultural connection. Join us for a meaningful day of music, artistic expression, and shared experiences that bring communities together and celebrate the power of creativity to inspire harmony.
highlights: Live Cultural Performances: Experience inspiring performances that showcase music, rhythm, and cultural storytelling from diverse communities.
Creative Art Exhibitions: Explore powerful visual art and installations that reflect themes of peace, identity, and cultural expression.
Community Engagement Activities: Participate in interactive moments designed to encourage connection, dialogue, and shared creativity.
Family-Friendly Experiences: Enjoy welcoming activities that allow people of all ages to celebrate culture, creativity, and togetherness.

events.title: Community Clean-Up Drive
events.description: Join us as we beautify our neighborhood and promote environmental stewardship. Gloves and bags provided.

programs.title: Cultural Arts Workshopsg
programs.description: Dance, drumming, and storytelling sessions for all ages.
programs.content: Our workshops provide immersive experiences in traditional African arts, fostering appreciation and skill development.
programs.getInvolvedText: Ready to join the experience? Sign up for upcoming workshops, bring a session to your school or organization, or connect with us to learn more.
programs.supportText: Your donation helps provide scholarships and instruments for students in need.

programs.title: Youth Mentorship
programs.description: Guiding young minds through leadership and skill-building programs.
programs.content: We empower the next generation with the tools they need to succeed, offering mentorship in leadership, arts, and personal development.

programs.title: Community Wellness
programs.description: Promoting health and well-being through holistic practices.
programs.content: Our wellness programs integrate rhythm, movement, and mindfulness to support community health and vitality.

pageContents.title: Home
pageContents.description: Afrokokoroot Foundation creates cultural programs, wellness events, and community impact across Nashville and beyond.
pageContents.heroSubtitle: Join Afrokokoroot to celebrate culture, build community, and uplift young leaders through art, nature, and shared experiences.

featureItems.title: Live Events
featureItems.description: Meaningful gatherings that celebrate music, art, and unity.

featureItems.title: Community Programs
featureItems.description: Workshops, mentorship, and wellness sessions designed for every age.

featureItems.title: Creative Education
featureItems.description: Cultural learning that honors African heritage and inspires future leaders.

content.headline: More Than a Foundation. A Global Movement.
content.body: Afrokokoroot Foundation empowers underserved children and families through accessible music education, cultural immersion, and nature-based learning that foster creativity, connection, and wholistic well-being.
content.ctaText: Discover how you can be part of our next event, program, or community initiative.

pageContents.title: About Us
pageContents.description: Learn about the Afrokokoroot Foundation's mission, governance, and commitment to preserving African heritage and empowering communities.
pageContents.heroSubtitle: The Afrokokoroot Foundation is a 501(c)(3) public charity dedicated to cultural education, wellness, and community empowerment through the universal language of community and nature.

content.missionIntro: Afrokokoroot Foundation is structured as a 501(c)(3) public charity. We are legally and operationally separate from commercial entities, and our mission is purely charitable and educational, focused on serving underserved communities.
content.governanceText: We maintain strict compliance and credibility through a diverse Board of Directors with a majority of independent members. Our governance follows strong policies for conflict of interest, financial oversight, and transparency.
content.leadershipCopy: Our independent board ensures we stay true to our mission and serve the public interest.
content.transparencyCopy: We are committed to open and honest financial reporting. Our funds are used strictly for charitable purposes, with clear separation from any commercial activities.

pageContents.title: Get Involved
pageContents.description: Join Afrokokoroot through volunteering, donations, and partnership opportunities that deepen our impact.
pageContents.heroSubtitle: Get involved through service, giving, volunteer opportunities, and community partnership with Afrokokoroot.
